name: Plover Bay Technologies Limited
summary: Plover Bay Technologies Limited, an investment holding company, designs, develops, markets, and sells software defined wide area network (SD-WAN) routers worldwide. It also provides software licences, and warranty and support services. The company markets and sells its products under the Peplink and Pepwave brands through distributors and resellers. In addition, it is involved in property holding activities. The company serves maritime and ground transport, public safety, education, and retail sectors, as well as enterprises. Plover Bay Technologies Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Lai Chi Kok, Hong Kong.
